mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO error_question ( user_id, api_id, subject, model, user_answer, correct_answer, answer_time, exam_record_id, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{apiId}, #{subject}, #{model}, #{userAnswer}, #{correctAnswer}, #{answerTime}, #{examRecordId}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, api_id, subject, model, user_answer, correct_answer, answer_time, exam_record_id, create_time FROM error_question WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE error_question SET user_id = #{userId}, api_id = #{apiId}, subject = #{subject}, model = #{model}, user_answer = #{userAnswer}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, answer_time = #{answerTime}, exam_record_id = #{examRecordId}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, api_id, subject, model, user_answer, correct_answer, answer_time, exam_record_id, create_time FROM error_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY answer_time DESC

SELECT eq.id AS id, eq.user_id AS userId, eq.api_id AS apiId, eq.subject AS subject, eq.model AS model, eq.user_answer AS userAnswer, eq.correct_answer AS correctAnswer, eq.answer_time AS answerTime, eq.exam_record_id AS examRecordId, eq.create_time AS createTime, q.question AS questionContent, q.item1 AS optionA, q.item2 AS optionB, q.item3 AS optionC, q.item4 AS optionD, q.explains AS analysis, q.url AS questionUrl, q.question_type AS questionType FROM error_question eq INNER JOIN question q ON eq.subject = q.subject AND eq.model = q.model AND eq.api_id = CAST(q.api_id AS CHAR) WHERE eq.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY eq.create_time DESC

SELECT -- 错题表字段 eq.id AS id, eq.user_id AS userId, eq.api_id AS apiId, eq.subject AS subject, eq.model AS model, eq.user_answer AS userAnswer, eq.correct_answer AS correctAnswer, eq.answer_time AS answerTime, eq.exam_record_id AS examRecordId, eq.create_time AS createTime, -- 题目表字段 q.question AS questionContent, q.item1 AS optionA, q.item2 AS optionB, q.item3 AS optionC, q.item4 AS optionD, q.explains AS analysis, q.url AS questionUrl, q.question_type AS questionType FROM error_question eq INNER JOIN question q ON eq.subject = q.subject AND eq.model = q.model AND eq.api_id = CAST(q.api_id AS CHAR) WHERE eq.user_id = #{userId} AND eq.subject = #{subject} AND eq.model = #{model} ORDER BY eq.create_time DESC

SELECT -- 错题表字段（包含 examRecordId，用于关联） eq.id AS id, eq.user_id AS userId, eq.api_id AS apiId, eq.subject AS subject, eq.model AS model, eq.user_answer AS userAnswer, eq.correct_answer AS correctAnswer, eq.answer_time AS answerTime, eq.exam_record_id AS examRecordId, eq.create_time AS createTime, -- 题目表字段（关联查询题目详情） q.question AS questionContent, q.item1 AS optionA, q.item2 AS optionB, q.item3 AS optionC, q.item4 AS optionD, q.explains AS analysis, q.url AS questionUrl, q.question_type AS questionType FROM error_question eq INNER JOIN question q ON eq.subject = q.subject AND eq.model = q.model AND eq.api_id = CAST(q.api_id AS CHAR) WHERE eq.user_id = #{userId} AND eq.subject = #{subject} AND eq.model = #{model} AND eq.exam_record_id = #{examRecordId} -- 核心条件：只查询该次考试的错题 ORDER BY eq.create_time DESC
